name: ASUS PRIME A620M-A-CSM Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 2x PCIe 3.0 x1 - Support DDR5-6400+(OC) - 2x M.2 Slots - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - VGA - USB 3.2 Gen1 Type-A - GbE LAN - Front USB 3.2 Gen 1 Type-C Header
shortName: ASUS PRIME A620M-A-CSM Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe
description: Entry-level AM5 socket micro-ATX motherboard with DDR5 support for budget-conscious builders.
